---
title: "SurveyBuilder GUI overview"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{SurveyBuilder GUI overview}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r setup, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(collapse = TRUE, comment = "#>")
library(surveyframe)
```

The SurveyBuilder is bundled as a self-contained HTML file. In automated
examples and checks, use `open = FALSE` so no browser is launched.

```{r builder-path}
path <- launch_builder(open = FALSE)
file.exists(path)
```

Analyse mode uses a three-panel workspace:

- left: variables and constructs
- middle: Plan, Run, and Report tabs with role-based analysis options
- right: output preview, reporting references, and a table-based model builder

The analysis registry controls method labels, required roles, compatible
measurement levels, significance-level visibility, assumptions, planned
outputs, and reporting references.
